text: Stepping into this space, I feel a serene curiosity arise within me. The modern museum-like environment invites reflection. The glass walls create a subtle barrier between the world outside and the curated ideas inside, which heightens my sense of anticipation. Approaching the R+D display, I am drawn to the emphasis on research, innovation, and the coexistence of technology and human life. Observing the poetic text about sunlight, performance, and surrender, I feel contemplative—aware of the fluid relationship between thought and action, the mind and its creations.
